name: Oracle HCM Cloud (Fusion) API
what_it_does: Oracle HCM Cloud (Fusion) REST API for enterprise human capital management platform. Enables AI agents to manage global workforce and employee data lifecycle, handle payroll processing across multiple countries and currencies, access talent management and performance review workflows, retrieve global HR and workforce analytics, manage absence and time and labor tracking, handle recruiting and onboarding workflows via Oracle Recruiting, access compensation and benefits administration, retrieve global payroll compliance reporting, manage organizational structures and workforce planning, and integrate HCM data with Oracle ERP, Oracle Finance, and third-party enterprise systems.
use_cases: Managing global employee data lifecycle from enterprise HR agents
Processing multi-country payroll from global payroll automation agents
Automating talent and performance workflows from HCM process agents
Integrating Oracle HCM with Oracle ERP from enterprise automation agents
not_for: SMB payroll and HR without Oracle enterprise licensing
Simple single-country payroll without global HCM suite requirements
Non-Oracle ERP shops requiring lightweight HR without deep Oracle integration
best_when: A large enterprise using Oracle HCM Cloud wants AI agents to automate global workforce management, multi-country payroll, talent workflows, compliance reporting, and deep Oracle ERP integration.
avoid_when: LEGAL+COMPLIANCE RISK: Oracle HCM global payroll automation spans multiple legal jurisdictions — each country has unique compliance requirements. Oracle's complex role-based access control model means automation must precisely scope permissions. Multi-country payroll errors have IRS, HMRC, and local tax authority consequences.

auth.notes: Oracle HCM uses OAuth 2.0 for REST API access. Oracle Identity Cloud Service (IDCS) for authentication. Role-based access control with fine-grained data security policies. Oracle Technology Network documentation. Business Events for event-driven integration. Oracle Integration Cloud for managed connectors. SOAP/REST hybrid in legacy endpoints.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise subscription per employee
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual per-employee subscription; module-based pricing for HCM, payroll, talent
pricing.notes: Austin, Texas. Oracle Corporation. Founded 1977. NYSE: ORCL. $13B+ cloud revenue. Oracle HCM used by 6,000+ enterprises globally. Tight integration with Oracle ERP (Fusion Financials). Oracle Payroll covers 40+ countries natively. Strong manufacturing, government, and financial services verticals. Competes with Workday and SAP SuccessFactors.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; bulk extract APIs for high-volume data

known_agent_gotchas: LEGAL RISK: Multi-country payroll automation has country-specific tax rules — Oracle covers 40+ countries but configuration complexity is high
Oracle IDCS for auth — authentication through Oracle Identity Cloud adds complexity vs standard OAuth2
No public MCP server — complex enterprise REST API requiring Oracle customer relationship
Data security policies — Oracle's fine-grained security model can produce unexpected access denials; test thoroughly
SOAP legacy endpoints — some Oracle HCM functions still use SOAP; REST migration ongoing
Oracle Integration Cloud recommended — Oracle pushes OIC for managed connectivity; pure REST is possible but less supported
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise HCM and global payroll. SOC1, SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, FedRAMP, HIPAA. Oracle IDCS + OAuth2. Multi-region. Employee PII and global payroll data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise HCM and payroll. SOC1, SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, FedRAMP. Oracle IDCS. Multi-region. Global employee PII and payroll data.
